caption: A person wearing blue scrubs, a patterned surgical cap, and a light-colored face mask leans over a brown table in an indoor room. The individual rests their left hand on a green rectangular mat on the table, while their right arm remains by their side. In the background, a whiteboard is visible on the left, and a doorway reveals another room with a blue cloth covering a surface. A white sign with a black arrow is posted on the wall to the right. On the table, next to the green mat, sits a small electronic device. On-screen graphics include a pink silhouette of a person walking with a cane, a pink circle containing the text "Day 1", and the text "Sim Week" next to a small logo of a building. As the sequence progresses, the person slightly shifts their posture, leaning further forward and pressing their hand more firmly onto the green mat.
